title: From THE NETHER [FTN]
description: Adds Jack Black from the movie to Minecraft.
body:
Adds a Jack Black mob that can: be ridden, place fire, place water, attack the player, play the funny sounds.

## Features - He's chill until you anger him. - He can run around, place fire and water, say the funny lines and attack you. - He can be bred with water buckets. - He follows you when holding flint and steal. ## Other Jack Black Skin by **[yoofluu](https://namemc.com/profile/yoofluu.1)** (I think.) Also, see **[From THE NETHER: Expansion Pack**](https://modrinth.com/mods/from-theother **[NetherTeam projects]([https://netherteam.pages.dev)**.
